text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I'm taking a break in the cafeteria,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Hmm. Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the cream is done, and the<n>height looks
perfect too! Our<n>ginormous wedding cake turned
out<n>splendidly! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
In front of Hishi Akebono stands a<n>large wedding
cake which towers<n>over even her.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wanted to throw a party for me<n>and the
other muses. We ran in<n>wedding dresses, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Our schedules have been a bit busy,<n>so we
haven't had a chance to<n>actually celebrate all our
hard work.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her explanation makes sense, but<n>I'm still
curious about the huge<n>number of cardboard
boxes lined up<n>next to the cake.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
These? They're American-grown<n>cherries!
They're my absolute<n>favorite!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
They're big, juicy, and incredibly<n>sweet! Once I
start eating them, I just<n>can't stop!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I'm going to use a whole bunch to top<n>the cake!
choice_data_list:
But they're your favorite. Are you okay with
using them all up?

But they're your favorite. Are you okay with
using them all up?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Of course! ♪ I want everyone to<n>enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Akebono! The muses have arrived!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, coming! Thanks, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you should come along and eat<n>up too. I still
owe you one for that the<n>trip to the farm. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I gladly accept and head to the party.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Okay, everyone! Go ahead and dig in!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Mmm! It's a culinarymasterpiece! This cake tastes evenmore incredible than it looks!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, try the cherry part too! You'll<n>love it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
They're so sweet and juicy! Have<n>you all tasted
the cherries?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Not yet. But the layers of sponge cake<n>and cream
have wowed me enough<n>already...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then you've gotta give it a try! ♪<n>I'll cut you a
slice!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, um, thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You look like you're in bliss, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Uh, ah! I just...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Worry not, I know how you feel. This<n>cake is
truly one of a kind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so happy! It's just so buono<n>that
everyone's enjoying this<n>wonderful meal
together! ☆
choice_data_list: Is that why you're sharing your cherries?
Is that why you're sharing your cherries?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I always feel buono when I eat<n>them, so I
want everyone to enjoy<n>them and be buono too!
☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Happiness grows the more you share<n>it! And
happiness is buono, buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So, please, you have some too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My piece is so large it barely fits on<n>the plate. I
take a giant bite, and as the<n>cake fills my
cheeks...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a wonderful expression<n>you have!
Now you know what it<n>means to be buono!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Go on, take some more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Open up! Say "Ahhh!" Come on, a little<n>bit more.
Ahhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I find myself somewhat flustered by<n>Hishi
Akebono's efforts to stuff my<n>face with cake,
but I have a great time<n>anyway.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I move to take the cake when...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Why, hello there, my beautiful angels!<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Beauty Anshinzawa?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, what a scrumptious-looking<n>cake! Those
dark red toppings look<n>utterly enticing. I feel
inspired all of a<n>sudden!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I come with a fair warning... An<n>occasional
treat is one thing, but<n>remember—moderation is a
thing of<n>B.E.A.U.T.Y.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Truuue! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After the meal, the muses engage in<n>some
intense training to burn off the<n>excess calories...
